subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who entereth the garden and remembereth God, his Lord, the All-Merciful. O party of the Wronged One! When ye attain unto His gate, recite ye the fragrant verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن یدخل البستان و یذکر الله ربه الرحمن یا حزب المظلوم اذا بلغتم بابه و قولوا السمات المعطره
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
